calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Motion For Prove Up Hearing On Default By Court
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Evan Daily, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JP Morgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Order waiving appearance of live witness is in the court's file
Copy of Declaration by Plaintiff's Witness Shirley White presented in open court.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Oxman College, A California Corp., Svetlana Dvorkin and Michael Dvorkin.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages - $57794.89
Attorney fees - $1000.00
Costs - $569.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $59,363.89
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
